creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Bugzilla Automation from comment #1)

Re: <https://www.freshports.org/textproc/py-sphinxext-opengraph/>, it seems likely that the reporter is the maintainer. 

Re: <https://github.com/wpilibsuite/sphinxext-opengraph/releases>, things have progressed beyond 0.7.0, to 0.7.5. 

I'm sorry that this bug report was not triaged sooner. Alexis, would you like to submit an alternative patch for something greater than 0.7.0? 

<https://github.com/wpilibsuite/sphinxext-opengraph/compare/v0.6.3...v0.7.5>

If you need to change your email address in Bugzilla (to match the current address of the maintainer): <https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/userprefs.cgi?tab=account>. 

Thank you.
